content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the full branch delta against the requested fork point, excluding live `.ralph-burning/projects/vl8z-1/` runtime state. `nix build`, `cargo test --locked`, `cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings`, and `cargo fmt --check` passed under `nix develop`/Nix, but the two recovery-path issues above remain.

## Amendments

1. `FailureObservationKind::AmendmentOscillationLimitReached` is only reachable in mocks, not through the real drain CLI path. The journal mapper only reads `failure_class` (`src/cli/drain.rs:753`), max-completion-round failures are emitted as unclassified `StageCommitFailed`/`unknown` with completion-round metadata (`src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:8231`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:8372`), and the app-error fallback defaults unclassified errors to `TransportFailure` (`src/cli/drain.rs:659`). A real final-review oscillation will therefore file a follow-up and abort instead of taking the `ForceCompleteRun` success path (`src/contexts/bead_workflow/drain.rs:432`). Amend this bead to parse the max-completion-round journal shape into `AmendmentOscillationLimitReached` and add a test using that real RunFailed shape.
   Classification: fix_current_bead
   Rationale: This breaks one of the required recovery actions in the real process adapter even though the pure drain mock test passes.
2. `ProcessDrainPorts::resume_run` treats a completed snapshot as failure whenever `execute_resume` returns an error (`src/cli/drain.rs:281`). But `execute_resume` deliberately returns `ResumeFailed` when stale-run reconciliation discovers the run already completed (`src/cli/run.rs:4356`) or when the snapshot is already completed (`src/cli/run.rs:4299`). In a queued resume cycle, that turns an actually completed bead into a transport failure and aborts/files a follow-up instead of opening and watching the PR. Amend the current bead to classify the already-completed resume case as `DrainRunOutcome::Completed` and cover it with a pending-resume test.
   Classification: fix_current_bead
   Rationale: The resume recovery path should continue when the run is found complete; otherwise unattended drain stops after a successful but reconciled run.
